figures.caption: Table 1: Performance of different LLM task planner on BoxNet3D-OBS with various motion planners. For each task–motion planner pair, we report task-level Success and StepDiff. Inference time is reported in Appendix A.3.

Figure 2: Task-level planning determines which robots act and their objectives at each step (top right), while motion-level planning generates obstacle-aware waypoint trajectories for execution (bottom right).
